summary: Full e2e testing of Movent app - all backend APIs and frontend flows tested. All 10 backend tests pass. All UI flows work correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Backend: /api/dashboard-metrics, /api/analyze-moment, /api/approve-intervention all working. Frontend: Moment Radar loads with 10 customers and 4 stat cards (10,7,8,62). Filters work correctly (High Risk=4, Medium Risk=4, Recovered=2). Moment Intelligence shows customer details, AI insight with Offline Mode badge (mock responses as expected), Approve Intervention button works and shows Approved state. Impact Cockpit shows 4 KPI cards, 2 Recharts charts (bar + line), intervention log with 8 rows and correctly colored outcome badges.
